title: Evangelion is Now for Dogs Too
display_title: Evangelion is Now for Dogs Too
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion is Now for Dogs, Too!             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 07, 2008 3:56 pm "Poochiel". That's all I have to say.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Aug 07, 2008 4:30 pm The shoulder pylons are the best part.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 07, 2008 5:40 pm OMG, WTF, what is this world coming to........

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Thu Aug 07, 2008 5:43 pm My chihuahua SO wants to be Shogouki!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 07, 2008 6:28 pm That is so wrong. But I want one.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Aug 07, 2008 7:19 pm Poor, poor puppies subjected to Gainax's whoring. :(

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Aug 07, 2008 7:21 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Poor, poor puppies subjected to Gainax's whoring. :(

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Thu Aug 07, 2008 8:30 pm They picked some weird looking dogs to model those pictures. I want to move to Japan just so I can buy more stuff like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Aug 07, 2008 9:36 pm Those are not puppies, those are caninoid decisive battle weapons created by man, know as: Dogangelion!

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Aug 07, 2008 11:19 pm Sachi_13 wrote: Fuck the puppies

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Aug 08, 2008 7:22 am Yes it is.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Aug 08, 2008 7:39 am That there's a Scooby Dooby Don't...

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Fri Aug 08, 2008 10:28 am The Sachiel one looks like it might be funnier with a cat.

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Fri Aug 08, 2008 11:29 am Jaysus... that's a case for the SPCA if ever I saw one. Those owners need to be put-down fast, to spare the worlkd from their reproduction

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Aug 08, 2008 6:35 pm The dog probably hates it too. See the look on it's face?

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Fri Aug 08, 2008 9:00 pm What the hell

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sat Aug 09, 2008 1:37 pm I really, REALLY hate myself for this but i want one of those. ;___;

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Aug 09, 2008 2:26 pm me too

[]:             Quote Post by AchtungAffen » Mon Aug 11, 2008 1:38 pm Those puppies look deliciousss

[]:             Quote Post by The Bastard King » Tue Aug 12, 2008 1:21 pm arwrarwrar.
